debug_anchor_sources: compile-owned declaration coordinates are authoritative for breakpoint and navigation anchors
emitted object artifact symbol inventory is authoritative for object-backed debug symbol visibility
fail_closed_claims: statement-level stepping remains fail-closed until native line-table evidence is emitted on the canonical toolchain path
full source-map claims remain fail-closed until emitted debug metadata proves them directly
claim_narrowing_constraints: the public debug surface must describe itself as declaration-breakpoint and artifact-inspection driven until richer metadata is emitted
debugger claims must stay rooted in emitted artifacts and runtime inspection facts
